subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One of all worlds, Who through the grace of the Most Great Name hath made to flow the Kawthar of knowledge [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقصود عالم را لایق و سزاست که بعنایت اسم اعظم کوثر علم
subcodes.subjects: @Hands of the Cause, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prayer for governments and rulers, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution
